## 📋 Pull Request Description

<!-- Describe what this PR does and why -->

---

## 🔄 Type of Change

Please check the relevant boxes:

- [ ] `feat` — New feature or category
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `style` — CSS/UI change only (no logic change)
- [ ] `refactor` — Code restructuring (no feature/fix)
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation update (README, memory files)
- [ ] `audio` — New or updated audio files
- [ ] `chore` — Config, tooling, or `.gitignore` change

---

## ✅ Testing Checklist

- [ ] Tested in **Chrome**
- [ ] Tested in **Firefox** or **Edge**
- [ ] All new cards render correctly in all 4 layout modes (Single, 3-Card, Scroll, Fit Screen)
- [ ] Audio plays correctly for all new items
- [ ] Slideshow works without errors
- [ ] No console errors

---

## 📁 Files Changed

<!-- List the key files changed or added -->

- `js/data/...`
- `assets/audio/...`
- `css/...`
